step_rationale: Platelet-derived proatherogenic marker; TNF superfamily; links adaptive immunity and platelet activation.
mechanism: BAFF, released from activated platelets, amplifies B-cell and vascular inflammation in atherothrombotic coronary disease.

references.title: Microvesicles in plasma reflect coronary flow reserve in patients with cardiovascular disease.
references.journal: American journal of physiology. Heart and circulatory physiology
